panels.title: recent fork events
panels.description: latest fork events with cause, authors, and resolution status

targets.rawSql: SELECT chain, block_number, competing_count, array_to_string(authors, ' vs ') as authors, cause, depth, resolved, resolved_hash, detected_at, resolved_at FROM fork_events WHERE ($__timeFilter(detected_at)) AND ('$chain' = 'all' OR chain = '$chain') ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: fork events per day
panels.description: daily fork count by chain from database

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', detected_at) as time, chain, count(*) as forks FROM fork_events WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', detected_at) as time, chain || ' ' || coalesce(cause, 'unknown') as metric, count(*) as value FROM fork_events WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at) AND ('$chain' = 'all' OR chain = '$chain') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: top forking authors (period)
panels.description: authors with most forked blocks in selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT chain, coalesce(author_name, author, 'unknown') as author, count(*) as fork_blocks FROM fork_blocks WHERE $__timeFilter(imported_at) AND ('$chain' = 'all' OR chain = '$chain') GROUP BY chain, author, author_name ORDER BY fork_blocks DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: fork depth distribution
panels.description: histogram of fork depths from database

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN depth = 1 THEN '1' WHEN depth = 2 THEN '2' WHEN depth = 3 THEN '3' WHEN depth BETWEEN 4 AND 5 THEN '4-5' WHEN depth BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10' ELSE '10+' END as depth_range, chain, count(*) as count FROM fork_events WHERE $__timeFilter(detected_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY min(depth)

panels.title: competing blocks detail
panels.description: all blocks at forked heights with relay parent info

targets.rawSql: SELECT b.chain, b.block_number, b.block_hash, coalesce(b.author_name, b.author, 'unknown') as author, b.relay_parent, array_to_string(b.seen_by, ', ') as seen_by, b.imported_at, e.cause, e.resolved, e.resolved_hash FROM fork_blocks b LEFT JOIN fork_events e ON b.chain = e.chain AND b.block_number = e.block_number WHERE $__timeFilter(b.imported_at) AND ('$chain' = 'all' OR b.chain = '$chain') ORDER BY b.imported_at DESC LIMIT 200

panels.title: relay fork tracing
panels.description: parachain forks caused by relay chain forks with relay height reference

targets.rawSql: SELECT chain, block_number, array_to_string(authors, ' vs ') as authors, relay_height, depth, detected_at FROM fork_events WHERE cause = 'relay_fork' AND $__timeFilter(detected_at) AND ('$chain' = 'all' OR chain = '$chain') ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: finality lag history
panels.description: long-term finality lag from periodic snapshots

targets.rawSql: SELECT recorded_at as time, chain || '/' || node as metric, lag as value FROM finality_log WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at) AND ('$chain' = 'all' OR chain = '$chain') ORDER BY recorded_at
